MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-23-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAR-01-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLAINTIFF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, DEFENDANT FAILING TO APPEAR. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. CAUSE SUMITTED. COURT RULES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARGROVE, OSHANDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1746 15TH ST. #240 S.F, CA. 94103 $1,567.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,567.40, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES COSTS.
